title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) is expected to have witnessed continued recovery in its legacy business in the fourth quarter, despite the choppy market situation.

title: Zimmer Biomet: Healthier Solutions Than Investment
text: Zimmer Biomet has been struggling, or better said, stagnating for years. Lack of progress has pretty much been the case since the tie-up between Zimmer and Biomet.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Retain Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Now
text: Investors are optimistic about Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) owing to ongoing business recovery from the COVID-led pandemic impact.
